log_example: 2026-05-25T16:08:31Z zeek_dns uid=C2008 id.orig_h=10.50.0.18 id.resp_h=203.0.113.200 query="cmd.8.beacon.example.net" qtype_name=A note=periodic C2 callback every 120s
snort_rule_reference: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET 53 (msg:"P1 Malware C2 DNS beacon 9"; content:"cmd."; nocase; dsize:>45; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:9100169; rev:1;)

log_example: 203.0.113.70 - - [25/May/2026:11:10:22 +0000] "GET /comment?text=<script>fetch("/x")</script> HTTP/1.1" 200 421 "https://forum.local/thread/7" "Mozilla/5.0"
snort_rule_reference: alert tcp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET 443 (msg:"P1 XSS payload marker 11"; flow:to_server,established; content:"<script>fetch("/x")</scr"; nocase; pcre:"/\<script\>fetch("\/x")\<\/script\>/i"; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9100071; rev:1;)
